text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)
Not sure if you meant this, but I used FreeBSD-13.0-STABLE-memstick.img images. The ones I used were from February 3rd, 10th and 17th. 

All of them failed at the exact same point in  mounting the /boot/iso so I cannot show the output of the commands you want. I'm sorry.
